name: python3-pexpect
title: python3-pexpect
summary: Python 3 module for automating interactive applications
description:
Python 3 module for automating interactive applications
Pexpect is a pure Python 3 module for spawning child applications;
controlling them; and responding to expected patterns in their
output. Pexpect works like Don Libes' Expect. Pexpect allows your
script to spawn a child application and control it as if a human were
typing commands.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pexpect because Python 3 module for automating interactive applications.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pexpect as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pexpect with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pexpect --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
